The treatment involves breaking down adhesions within the temporomandibular joint (TMJ), which can be effectively accomplished using a high-energy laser to vaporize or ablate scar tissue. Among the given lasers, those with higher energy output that produce shorter wavelengths would likely be more suitable due to their ability to penetrate tissues efficiently while minimizing thermal damage.

Answer Choice: A
